title: PicoShare
description: Minimalist self-hosted file-sharing service for generating shareable download links to files of any size.
installation: PicoShare stores everything in a single SQLite database under /data (no external datastore add-on needed). REQUIRED: set PS_SHARED_SECRET to a strong random value before exposing publicly (it is the admin/upload passphrase) and rotate the default. Optional: enable Litestream streaming backups by setting LITESTREAM_BUCKET / LITESTREAM_ENDPOINT / LITESTREAM_ACCESS_KEY_ID / LITESTREAM_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY (requires an external S3-compatible bucket; omitted from addons since Kubero add-ons do not cover S3). The persistent volume at /data must be retained across upgrades or all uploads and links are lost.
